query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  c.phone,
  c.email,
  c.address1,
  c.address2,
  c.locationUrl1,
  c.locationUrl2,
  c.notes,
  c.regionId,
  ANY_VALUE(r.name) as regionName,
  c.lastDeliveryLocation,
  c.lastDeliveryAt,
  c.createdAt,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'delivered' THEN o.totalPrice ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalSpent
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN regions r ON c.regionId = r.id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customerId
WHERE c.branchId = 2
  AND (c.name LIKE '%077%' OR c.phone LIKE '%077%' OR c.email LIKE '%077%')
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.phone, c.email, c.address1, c.address2, c.locationUrl1, c.locationUrl2, c.notes, c.regionId, c.lastDeliveryLocation, c.lastDeliveryAt, c.createdAt
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

  AND (c.name LIKE '%077%' OR c.phone LIKE '%077%' OR c.email LIKE '%077%')
